businessContext.businessDescription: ACME Logistics Corp provides last-mile delivery services for e-commerce.
challenges: Delivery delays due to poor route optimization
Customer satisfaction dropping due to lack of real-time tracking
High fuel costs from inefficient routing
constraints: Must integrate with existing SAP ERP system

topic.scopeNotes: Focus on AI-powered route optimization and real-time tracking

ideas.title: AI-Powered Route Optimizer
ideas.description: Use machine learning to optimize delivery routes in real-time based on traffic, weather, and package priority.
ideas.aspirationalScope: Reduce delivery times by 20% and fuel costs by 15%
assumptions: Driver apps can receive updated routes

ideas.title: Predictive Delivery Window
ideas.description: Predict accurate 1-hour delivery windows for customers using AI.

selection.selectionRationale: Highest feasibility-value score. Directly addresses the primary business challenge of route inefficiency and has clear ROI through fuel cost reduction.

milestones.title: Data Pipeline Setup
items: Ingest historical delivery data from CSV
Connect to traffic API (mocked for PoC)

plan.architectureNotes: Node.js 20 + TypeScript. Simple in-process route optimizer (no external ML service for PoC). Express for HTTP layer. Vitest for testing. Dependencies: express, typescript, vitest.

turns.content: We are ACME Logistics and we struggle with delivery route optimization.
Here is the implementation plan for the AI-Powered Route Optimizer PoC.
